name: Unbounded Knapsack
description: Maximize total value when items can be used unlimited times, given a weight capacity.
intuition: dp[w] = max value with capacity w. For each capacity and each item: if item fits, try including another copy. dp[w] = max(dp[w], dp[w-weight]+value). Unlike 0/1 knapsack, we look backwards instead of keeping separate rows.
